member.name: T:Acme.Retail.Domain.Entities.AuditEvent
member.summary: Tamper-evident audit event (append-only; 7-year retention). Personal data writes MUST emit one of these per .eas/instruction.md data policy.

member.name: P:Acme.Retail.Domain.Entities.AuditEvent.AggregateId
member.summary: Aggregate id this event pertains to (partition key).

member.name: P:Acme.Retail.Domain.Entities.AuditEvent.ActorId
member.summary: Actor that performed the action (a customer or admin id, or "system").

member.name: P:Acme.Retail.Domain.Entities.AuditEvent.SubjectId
member.summary: Subject the action was performed on (often the customer id).

member.name: P:Acme.Retail.Domain.Entities.AuditEvent.Details
member.summary: Optional structured detail (must NOT contain PAN/CVV).

member.name: T:Acme.Retail.Domain.Entities.CartItem
member.summary: A single line in a customer's cart.

member.name: P:Acme.Retail.Domain.Entities.CartItem.ItemId
member.summary: Per-cart item id (used by PATCH/DELETE endpoints).

member.name: P:Acme.Retail.Domain.Entities.CartItem.ProductName
member.summary: Snapshot of the product name at add time.

member.name: P:Acme.Retail.Domain.Entities.CartItem.UnitPrice
member.summary: Snapshot of the unit price at add time.

member.name: F:Acme.Retail.Domain.Entities.Cart.MaxItemQuantity
member.summary: Maximum quantity per line; business rule.

member.name: P:Acme.Retail.Domain.Entities.Cart.CustomerId
member.summary: Cart id (1:1 with customer in this MVP).

member.name: P:Acme.Retail.Domain.Entities.Cart.Currency
member.summary: Currency for all lines (carts are single-currency).

member.name: M:Acme.Retail.Domain.Entities.Cart.AddItem(Acme.Retail.Domain.Entities.Product,System.Int32)
member.summary: Adds a product line to the cart, merging quantities with any existing line for the same product.

member.name: M:Acme.Retail.Domain.Entities.Cart.UpdateItemQuantity(System.Guid,System.Int32)
member.summary: Updates the quantity of a single line, or removes it if quantity is zero.

member.name: T:Acme.Retail.Domain.Entities.Category
member.summary: A category in the product catalog.

member.name: P:Acme.Retail.Domain.Entities.Category.Region
member.summary: Geographic region used as the Cosmos partition key (e.g., "EU", "NA").

member.name: P:Acme.Retail.Domain.Entities.Category.ParentCategoryId
member.summary: Optional parent category id (null for root).

member.name: P:Acme.Retail.Domain.Entities.Product.CategoryId
member.summary: Owning category id (used as the Cosmos partition key).

member.name: P:Acme.Retail.Domain.Entities.Product.IsActive
member.summary: Whether this product is visible on the storefront.

member.name: P:Acme.Retail.Domain.Entities.Address.RecipientName
member.summary: Recipient name (separate from any payment cardholder name).

member.name: T:Acme.Retail.Domain.Entities.PaymentMethod
member.summary: Payment instrument metadata. Per .eas/policies/pci.md §4 we may store ONLY the fields below — never PAN, CVV, full track, or cardholder name.

member.name: P:Acme.Retail.Domain.Entities.PaymentMethod.PaymentToken
member.summary: Opaque token issued by the payment provider.

member.name: P:Acme.Retail.Domain.Entities.PaymentMethod.Last4
member.summary: Last 4 digits of the card (for support / fraud signals only).

member.name: P:Acme.Retail.Domain.Entities.PaymentMethod.ExpiryYearMonth
member.summary: Expiry as YYYY-MM (used for "expiring card" reminders).

member.name: P:Acme.Retail.Domain.Entities.PaymentMethod.CreatedAt
member.summary: When the customer added this method (UTC).

member.name: T:Acme.Retail.Domain.Entities.Customer
member.summary: Customer profile aggregate (personal data; CMK-encrypted at rest).

member.name: P:Acme.Retail.Domain.Entities.Customer.Id
member.summary: Stable internal customer id (GUID; not derived from PII per GDPR §5).

member.name: P:Acme.Retail.Domain.Entities.Customer.ExternalId
member.summary: Entra External ID object id (the oid/sub claim value).

member.name: P:Acme.Retail.Domain.Entities.Customer.LastActivityAt
member.summary: Last activity timestamp; drives 7-year retention from this point.

member.name: P:Acme.Retail.Domain.Entities.Customer.ErasureRequestedAt
member.summary: Set when an erasure request is in progress (Art. 17 workflow).

member.name: P:Acme.Retail.Domain.Entities.CustomerPreferences.MarketingEmailOptIn
member.summary: Whether the customer has opted into marketing email (consent basis).

member.name: P:Acme.Retail.Domain.Entities.CustomerPreferences.ProcessingRestricted
member.summary: Whether processing is restricted under Art. 18.

member.name: T:Acme.Retail.Domain.Entities.OrderLine
member.summary: One line on a placed order (immutable once written).

member.name: P:Acme.Retail.Domain.Entities.OrderLine.ProductName
member.summary: Snapshot of the product name at order time.

member.name: P:Acme.Retail.Domain.Entities.OrderLine.UnitPrice
member.summary: Snapshot of unit price at order time.

member.name: T:Acme.Retail.Domain.Entities.Order
member.summary: Placed order. Immutable history (append-only); 7-year retention per .eas/policies/gdpr.md. Stores only PCI-allowed payment fields per .eas/policies/pci.md.

member.name: P:Acme.Retail.Domain.Entities.Order.CustomerId
member.summary: Customer who placed the order (partition key).

member.name: P:Acme.Retail.Domain.Entities.Order.PaymentToken
member.summary: Opaque payment token returned by the provider.

member.name: P:Acme.Retail.Domain.Entities.Order.PaymentLast4
member.summary: Last 4 digits of the payment instrument (allowable per pci.md §4).

member.name: T:Acme.Retail.Domain.Repositories.IProductRepository
member.summary: Read/write access to the product catalog.

member.name: M:Acme.Retail.Domain.Repositories.IProductRepository.SearchAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Searches the catalog using the supplied filters.

member.name: M:Acme.Retail.Domain.Repositories.IProductRepository.GetAsync(Acme.Retail.Domain.ValueObjects.ProductId,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Loads a single product by id.

member.name: M:Acme.Retail.Domain.Repositories.ICategoryRepository.ListAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Lists all categories for the given region.

member.name: M:Acme.Retail.Domain.Repositories.ICartRepository.GetAsync(Acme.Retail.Domain.ValueObjects.CustomerId,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Fetches the customer's cart, or null if none exists.

member.name: M:Acme.Retail.Domain.Repositories.ICartRepository.DeleteAsync(Acme.Retail.Domain.ValueObjects.CustomerId,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes the cart entirely (used by GDPR erasure).

member.name: M:Acme.Retail.Domain.Repositories.IOrderRepository.ListForCustomerAsync(Acme.Retail.Domain.ValueObjects.CustomerId,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Lists orders for a customer, newest first.

member.name: M:Acme.Retail.Domain.Repositories.IOrderRepository.GetAsync(Acme.Retail.Domain.ValueObjects.OrderId,Acme.Retail.Domain.ValueObjects.CustomerId,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Loads a single order by id.

member.name: M:Acme.Retail.Domain.Repositories.ICustomerRepository.GetAsync(Acme.Retail.Domain.ValueObjects.CustomerId,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Loads a customer by internal id.

member.name: M:Acme.Retail.Domain.Repositories.ICustomerRepository.GetByExternalIdAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Loads a customer by Entra external id.

member.name: M:Acme.Retail.Domain.Repositories.ICustomerRepository.DeleteAsync(Acme.Retail.Domain.ValueObjects.CustomerId,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Hard-deletes a customer (GDPR Art. 17 erasure where no legal hold applies).

member.name: T:Acme.Retail.Domain.Repositories.IAuditRepository
member.summary: Append-only access to the audit log.

member.name: T:Acme.Retail.Domain.Result`1
member.summary: Discriminated success/failure result for domain operations. Avoids exceptions for expected business outcomes (validation, not-found, conflict) while keeping unexpected faults as exceptions.

member.name: P:Acme.Retail.Domain.Result`1.Value
member.summary: The success value (only valid when is true).

member.name: P:Acme.Retail.Domain.Result`1.ErrorCode
member.summary: Stable, machine-readable error code (only valid on failure).

member.name: P:Acme.Retail.Domain.Result`1.ErrorMessage
member.summary: Human-readable error message (only valid on failure).

member.name: F:Acme.Retail.Domain.DomainErrors.RuleViolation
member.summary: Business rule violation (e.g., quantity exceeds max).

member.name: T:Acme.Retail.Domain.Services.ProductSearchSpecification
member.summary: Pure search filter logic for the catalog (Story 1). No I/O — operates over an in-memory product sequence so it is trivially unit-testable and reusable behind any repository.

member.name: F:Acme.Retail.Domain.Services.ProductSearchSpecification.DefaultPageSize
member.summary: Default page size when none provided.

member.name: M:Acme.Retail.Domain.Services.ProductSearchSpecification.Apply(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Acme.Retail.Domain.Entities.Product},System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Applies query/category filters and pagination to the input sequence.
member.param: Source products (already loaded by the caller from the repository).
Free-text search; matches name, description, or tags (case-insensitive).
Page size (values out of range are clamped to / ).
member.returns: The filtered, ordered, and paginated subset along with the total match count.

member.name: T:Acme.Retail.Domain.Services.ProductSearchResult
member.param: Total match count across all pages.

member.name: M:Acme.Retail.Domain.Services.ProductSearchResult.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{Acme.Retail.Domain.Entities.Product},System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.param: Total match count across all pages.

member.name: P:Acme.Retail.Domain.Services.ProductSearchResult.TotalCount
member.summary: Total match count across all pages.

member.name: M:Acme.Retail.Domain.ValueObjects.ProductId.New
member.summary: Creates a new random product id.

member.name: M:Acme.Retail.Domain.ValueObjects.ProductId.Parse(System.String)
member.summary: Parses from string; throws on invalid input.

member.name: M:Acme.Retail.Domain.ValueObjects.CustomerId.New
member.summary: Creates a new random customer id.

member.name: M:Acme.Retail.Domain.ValueObjects.CustomerId.Parse(System.String)
member.summary: Parses from string; throws on invalid input.

member.name: M:Acme.Retail.Domain.ValueObjects.OrderId.New
member.summary: Creates a new random order id.

member.name: M:Acme.Retail.Domain.ValueObjects.OrderId.Parse(System.String)
member.summary: Parses from string; throws on invalid input.

member.name: T:Acme.Retail.Domain.ValueObjects.Money
member.summary: Money value object — amount + ISO-4217 currency code. Operations across mismatched currencies throw.

member.name: M:Acme.Retail.Domain.ValueObjects.Money.#ctor(System.Decimal,System.String)
member.param: Amount; may be negative for refunds.
member.exception: Thrown when currency is not a 3-letter code.

member.name: M:Acme.Retail.Domain.ValueObjects.Money.op_Addition(Acme.Retail.Domain.ValueObjects.Money,Acme.Retail.Domain.ValueObjects.Money)
member.summary: Adds two money values; both must share currency.

member.name: M:Acme.Retail.Domain.ValueObjects.Money.op_Subtraction(Acme.Retail.Domain.ValueObjects.Money,Acme.Retail.Domain.ValueObjects.Money)
member.summary: Subtracts right from left; both must share currency.

member.name: M:Acme.Retail.Domain.ValueObjects.Money.op_Multiply(Acme.Retail.Domain.ValueObjects.Money,System.Int32)
member.summary: Scales the amount by an integer multiplier.
